title: Sorting options on columns in dashboards
excerpt: At the moment there’s no sorting option on every column in a table widget on a dashboard. The main table on the board however can. Useful to have this also in the dashboard. For my use case I would like to be able to sor…

posts.author: natalie.oyen (Natalie)
posts.cookedHtml: At the moment there’s no sorting option on every column in a table widget on a dashboard. The main table on the board however can. Useful to have this also in the dashboard. For my use case I would like to be able to sort by priority (rating).
